name: copilot-cli-extensions
description: Seven Copilot CLI extensions: five multi-model orchestrators (triple-duck parallel critique + consensus; triple-review iterative code review; triple-plan parallel planning + judge merge; debate adversarial 2-model + judge; duck-council 6 role-specialized rubber-ducks + judge synthesis) that return a markdown instruction packet the calling agent executes via the built-in `task` tool; zerotrust-sourcecheck (32-role multi-model security council against a GitHub URL or local on-disk directory, with hardened clone/install/build safe-wrapper tools for runtime verification); and mcp-autoreload (auto-reloads stale MCP server connections on transport errors, escalating to the user if a reload doesn't recover, and exposes an `mcp_reload_now` tool).
